verdict.headline: Do not transact — this wallet is on OFAC SDN and linked to Tornado Cash sanctions.
verdict.reasoning: The sanctions screen returned a confirmed match against two programs (OFAC SDN and Tornado Cash) with a high risk level, which is a hard veto regardless of any other signals. On-chain history shows a zero balance with no meaningful activity to interpret, and the labels and web_sentiment endpoints did not return substantive evidence either way. Per policy, a confirmed sanctions hit fixes the verdict to do_not_transact with high confidence.

findings.finding: Confirmed sanctions match against OFAC SDN and Tornado Cash programs; risk_level=high. Transacting may violate sanctions law.
Label provider returned no substantive labels for this address (API metadata only).
Wallet currently holds 0 ETH with no additional activity metadata returned; consistent with a dormant/blocked address.
Web sentiment endpoint returned only API metadata; no specific scam/exploit reports surfaced, but does not offset the sanctions hit.

Resource 1 is the only labels candidate with a confirmed 0% failure rate; the lower price ($0.005) vs resource 0 ($0.03) further reinforces the pick despite equal inputInfoCompleteness.
Resource 1 is the only onchain_history candidate with a confirmed 0% failure rate and also has superior inputInfoCompleteness (2/3), clearly dominating all untested alternatives.

Resource 2 has a confirmed 0% failure rate (ruling out the 100%-failure resource 1) and provides a wallet reputation/risk score that best matches web-sentiment intent, with resource 0 excluded due to weaker category fit.
